title: Add governance complexity repayment mechanism
outOfScope: Deleting or rewriting immutable archive evidence.
Measuring external adopter repositories in this Work Item.

sources.reason: Existing complexity report and blocking budget evaluator.
Existing complexity and archive-integrity regression coverage.
Current governance complexity contract and reviewer guidance.
Japanese documentation alignment for the same policy boundary.
Authorized Work Item 12 acceptance and sequence.

riskAssessment.reason: The change expands deterministic repository-shape evidence and must prevent budget increases from masking unrepayed complexity.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the serial remediation plan and the requested operation is repository governance maintenance.

preReviewWarnings: Review that budget changes require a concrete repayment record and that reported metrics remain deterministic and fail-closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The report includes deterministic metrics for Python lines, per-function complexity, schema count, guard count, repeated protocol fields, dependency cycles, install allowlist size, archive growth, and generated evidence ratio.
Every budget increase is blocked unless the Contract records deleted duplicate concepts or an owner and due date for repayment; the report distinguishes budget enforcement from repayment evidence.
Tests cover metric collection, budget increase without repayment, repayment with owner and due date, and stable deterministic output.
English and Japanese governance-complexity documentation and the Make quality path describe the repayment rule without weakening archive integrity.
guidelines: Keep complexity inventory deterministic, local, and read-only.
Do not use a budget increase as a substitute for repayment evidence.
Preserve immutable archive evidence and fail closed on malformed policy or repayment records.

intent.problem: The current complexity check has only a small number of aggregate budgets, so repeated protocol concepts and repository-shape growth can be hidden by raising a ceiling without recording how the complexity will be repaid.
constraints: Do not delete or rewrite archived Contract, Summary, or manifest evidence.
The evaluator must remain deterministic and must not depend on network services.
Retain existing archive-integrity and fail-closed behavior.
intent.rationale: A multi-metric inventory plus explicit repayment evidence makes governance growth reviewable while keeping budgets as enforcement tools rather than a log of excuses.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: repayment record has owner and due date
deterministic metric report and malformed policy fail closed

rawUserRequest: 继续，循环到所有任务全部完成，中途不要停。

declaredIntent.summary: Make governance complexity growth measurable and require repayment evidence for budget increases.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continuous execution of the serial remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
